title: Pinterest Q3 2021 Earnings Preview
text: Pinterest reported better-than-expected earnings and revenue for the third quarter. Adjusted earnings per share were 28 cents versus 23 cents expected by Refinitiv, and revenue was $633 million versus $630.9 million expected by Refinitiv. The company beat expectations on average revenue per user, which was $1.41 versus $1.38 forecast by StreetAccount. However, the company missed on user growth with monthly active users at 444 million versus 460 million expected by StreetAccount. This was the second quarter in a row that Pinterest saw a decline in monthly users. The company's stock rose 6% in extended trading.
